/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC --coverage -O3 -g -pedantic -Wall -Wextra -fPIC -march=native -O3 -g -pedantic -fPIC -D __FILENAME__='"$$(subst  /home/igor/Documentos/[08] Projetos/[16]_DW_Decomp/,,$$(abspath $$<))"' -g -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Instances.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libInstances.so -o libInstances.so CMakeFiles/Instances.dir/src/InstanceVRPTW.cpp.o   -L/home/igor/gurobi1200/linux64/lib  -Wl,-rpath,"/home/igor/gurobi1200/linux64/lib:/home/igor/Documentos/[08] Projetos/[16]_DW_Decomp/cmake-build-debug-coverage/DW_Decomp" ../DW_Decomp/libDwDecompd.so -lgurobi_c++ -lgurobi
